{{Quote|If they're shifty enough to wager on our crumbling union, then who's to say where exactly those credits are coming from?|[[Orn Free Taa/Legends|Orn Free Taa]] on [[Char Bibbeck]] and Jonas Wallen|<ref name="HNN51">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|51|news/13411_4.html|Senators Found Gambling on Secessions}}</ref>}}
'''Jonas Wallen''' was the [[Senator/Legends|senator]] of [[Eucer sector/Legends|Eucer sector]] during the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]]. He was involved in a [[Gambling/Legends|gambling]] scandal with fellow senator [[Char Bibbeck]], in which the two senators were accused of betting on which [[Planet/Legends|planets]] would secede from the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].
